description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a dynamic, angular pose. The figure appears to be wearing a sleek, form-fitting outfit with high-gloss surfaces, giving it a futuristic or avant-garde appearance. The head is slightly turned, and the facial features are simplified, with a distinct, sharp jawline. The arms and legs are extended, with one leg dramatically stretched downward, suggesting movement or a dramatic stance. The figure's hair is long and flows backward, adding to the sense of motion. The overall design is highly abstract, with sharp, intersecting lines and a sculptural quality.
description: A highly stylized adult pedestrian with elongated limbs, a dynamic pose, and a sleek, glossy outfit. The figure features long flowing hair and an abstract, angular design.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from a high angle, highlighting the elongated leg and flowing hair, with the upper body and face partially visible.
description_view_1: A side view showing the profile of the face, the sleek outfit, and the dramatic extension of the limbs.
description_view_2: A rear-angled view emphasizing the back, the long hair, and the intersecting angular elements of the design.
description_view_3: A side-rear view focusing on the figure's posture, the extended leg, and the abstract, sharp lines of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic form-fitting bodysuit with sculptural, angular elements
attribute_posture: dynamic, extended pose with one leg dramatically stretched downward
